- [ ] Architecture code trace (forward pass)
- [ ] Module breakdown with tensor shapes
- [ ] Training pipeline analysis
- [ ] Data pipeline analysis
- [ ] Reverse engineering notes (paper vs code differences)
- [ ] Key code snippets extraction
